verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You have called us to Your table, Love is waiting there, Spread before us, Heaven's table, tenderly prepared, Broken there the Bread of Life, flowing there the Healing Wine.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We will meet You there and we'll find grace, To help in time of need, oh, We will meet You there and seek Your face, Bowing on our knees, and we'll cry, "Holy, holy, holy!" We will meet You there.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All are welcome at Your table, hope is waiting there, Whosoever to Your table, find Your tender care, Broken there the Bread of Life, flowing there the Healing Wine.
